name: Anivia

basic_attack.calculation_notes: Missile speed uses canonical ranged fallback (2000) because source champion payload omits basic-attack missile speed.

passive.name: Rebirth
passive.description_source: Innate: Periodically, upon  dying,  Anivia will instead revert into an egg. If the egg can survive for a few seconds, she is gloriously  reborn.

effects.description: Innate: Periodically, upon taking fatal damage, Anivia enters resurrection for 6 seconds and restores all of her health.
While under resurrection, Anivia is unable to act and gains -40 : 20 (based on level) bonus armor and bonus magic resistance.
If Anivia remains alive by the end of the duration, she is revived with her current health.

passive.description: Innate: Periodically, upon taking fatal damage, Anivia enters resurrection for 6 seconds and restores all of her health.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Triggering Rebirth will break tethers on Anivia.

basic_ability_1.name: Flash Frost
basic_ability_1.description_source: Active:  Anivia launches a chunk of ice that deals magic damage and  slows enemies hit.

effects.context_notes: Active: Anivia launches a chunk of ice in the target direction that deals magic damage to enemies hit and slows them by 20% : 40% (based on Glacial Storm's Rank) for 3 seconds.

effects.description: Flash Frost can be recast while the ice is in flight after its cast time, and does so automatically at maximum range.

effects.context_notes: Recast: Anivia shatters the ice, dealing magic damage to nearby enemies and stunning them for a duration, as well as refreshing the slow.
Recast: Anivia shatters the ice, dealing magic damage to nearby enemies and stunning them for a duration, as well as refreshing the slow.
Recast: Anivia shatters the ice, dealing magic damage to nearby enemies and stunning them for a duration, as well as refreshing the slow.

basic_ability_1.description: Active: Anivia launches a chunk of ice in the target direction that deals magic damage to enemies hit and slows them by 20% : 40% (based on Glacial Storm's Rank) for 3 seconds.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): The initial cast and the manual recast count as ability activations for the purposes of on-cast effects such as Spellblade and triggering Force Pulse's passive.

basic_ability_2.name: Crystallize
basic_ability_2.description_source: Active:  Anivia  erects a wall of ice that lingers for a few seconds, blocking movement.

effects.context_notes: Active: Anivia summons a wall of ice at the target location perpendicular to her facing, knocking all units away from it, though not through terrain.
Active: Anivia summons a wall of ice at the target location perpendicular to her facing, knocking all units away from it, though not through terrain.
Active: Anivia summons a wall of ice at the target location perpendicular to her facing, knocking all units away from it, though not through terrain.
Active: Anivia summons a wall of ice at the target location perpendicular to her facing, knocking all units away from it, though not through terrain.

basic_ability_2.description: Active: Anivia summons a wall of ice at the target location perpendicular to her facing, knocking all units away from it, though not through terrain. The wall lingers as impassable terrain for 5 seconds.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Crystallize's displacement triggers in-combat effects by dealing 0 proc true damage, such as drawing turret aggro, Sudden Impact and applying Elixir of Sorcery.

basic_ability_3.name: Frostbite
basic_ability_3.description_source: Active:  Anivia blasts a freezing wind at the target enemy that deals magic damage.

effects.description: Passive: Enemies hit by Flash Frost or a fully formed Glacial Storm become Chilled for 3 seconds, refreshing on subsequent hits.

effects.context_notes: Active: Anivia blasts a freezing wind at the target enemy that deals magic damage, doubled if they were Chilled.
Active: Anivia blasts a freezing wind at the target enemy that deals magic damage, doubled if they were Chilled.

basic_ability_3.description: Passive: Enemies hit by Flash Frost or a fully formed Glacial Storm become Chilled for 3 seconds, refreshing on subsequent hits.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): The damage of Frostbite is calculated once it hits.

ultimate.name: Glacial Storm
ultimate.description_source: Passive:  Flash Frost's  slow is increased.

effects.context_notes: Passive: Flash Frost's slow strength is increased.
Active: Anivia creates a blizzard at the target location, dealing magic damage every 0.5 seconds and refreshing its slow while enemies remain inside.
Active: Anivia creates a blizzard at the target location, dealing magic damage every 0.5 seconds and refreshing its slow while enemies remain inside.
The blizzard increases in size over 1.5 seconds, then becomes empowered with higher damage and stronger slow output.
The blizzard increases in size over 1.5 seconds, then becomes empowered with higher damage and stronger slow output.

effects.description: Glacial Storm can be recast after 1 second, and does so automatically if Anivia is no longer in range or unable to pay the mana cost, or becomes affected by any form of cast-inhibiting crowd control.
Recast: Anivia ends Glacial Storm, dealing one last tick of damage.

ultimate.description: Passive: Flash Frost's slow strength is increased.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Toggle abilities do not count as ability activations for the purposes of on-cast effects such as Spellblade and triggering Force Pulse's passive.

sources.used_for: canonical champion baseline generation for stats, abilities, and execution metadata
manual verification of ability timing and execution semantics for context-note normalization

notes: Generated from From Online champion payload as part of champion corpus parity coverage.
Ability execution metadata is source-derived from castTime/speed/effectRadius when present.
This baseline should be manually refined for high-impact simulation nuances before runtime scripting expansion.

schema_notes.base_by_rank: Arrays indexed by ability rank (1-based in game, 0-based in data).
schema_notes.base_by_champion_level: Arrays indexed by champion level minus one.
schema_notes.formula: Formula objects use explicit op/terms/output_stat when reliable source math is available.
schema_notes.ratio_type: Common ratio types: total_ad, bonus_ad, ap, target_max_health, target_missing_health.
schema_notes.value_percent: Percent values are represented as whole percentages unless noted otherwise.
schema_notes.basic_attack: Basic attack timing and projectile defaults are source-derived with documented fallbacks.
schema_notes.basic_attack_raw_timing_stats: Raw timing stats preserve source payload fields for auditability.
